title: Accounts Assistant
description:
Accounts Payable (AP):

·       Ensure timely payments with processing supplier invoices, subcontractor claims, and staff expense reimbursements.

·       Verify supporting documents (delivery orders, site claims, purchase orders).

·       Liaise across the department for documentation of claims and petty cash.

Accounts Receivable (AR):

·       Issue invoices to clients and emails SOA to clients

·       Monitor aging reports

·       Maintain accurate records of receipts and outstanding balances.

General Ledger & Data Entry:

·       Record daily transactions into accounting software.

·       Assist in monthly closing, journal entries, and reconciliations.

Compliance & Reporting:

·       Assist in GST submissions and statutory filings

·       Maintain proper filing of accounting documents for easy retrieval.

Administrative Support:

·       Provide support to the Accounts Executive/Accountant in ad-hoc tasks.

·       Handle basic office administration related to finance (e.g., petty cash, bank deposits).

Requirements

  • Diploma in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
  • 1–3 years of accounting experience (construction/engineering industry preferred).
  • Proficiency in MS Excel and accounting software.
  • Strong attention to detail and accuracy in data entry.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Digital literacy will be an added advantage.

postedCompany.description:
YONG FONG ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION PTE. LTD.

Yong Fong Engineering & Construction Pte. Ltd. was established in 2014 and based in Singapore with the aim of developing methods for working at heights and applying them to a variety of commercial and industrial projects. We offer a range of specialized rope access services, with work carried out by qualified personnel working throughout Singapore and Asia.

Yong Fong Engineering & Construction Pte. Ltd. is implementing ISO 9001 and BizSAFE Star in our daily operation.

The company is now one of the leading industrial rope access companies in Asia and provides consulting services and rope access solutions to access difficult areas. Our abseiling technicians are trained and assessed with the IRATA training scheme. We offer a range of specialist services inspections and testing, building inspections, repair and maintenance. All works are carried out by qualified technicians.
postedCompany.name: YONG FONG ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
